decisions.briefing: Market data is unavailable today, so no directional signals to act on. Cash sits at $477 — just under the $500 threshold that would trigger a strong preference for new positions, so holding idle is the right call. All six current positions remain intact; the portfolio continues to run at +31.6% overall with no stop-loss or profit-target alerts triggered.

market_education.summary_en: No market data or news headlines were available for today's session, which itself is informative — it signals either a data feed outage or an extremely quiet trading day with no major catalysts. When macro data goes dark, the prudent move is to hold existing positions rather than act on noise. The portfolio's momentum-driven holdings remain intact pending the next confirmed market signal.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場數據及新聞均無法取得，此情況本身即具參考意義——可能反映數據源中斷，或市場處於極度平靜的交易日，缺乏主要催化劑。當總體數據暫時失靈，謹慎的做法是持守現有倉位，而非在雜訊中貿然行動。投資組合中的動能型持股維持不變，等待下一個明確市場訊號出現。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag refers to the performance penalty a portfolio suffers by holding uninvested cash instead of putting it to work in the market. While holding cash reduces risk, it also means missing out on potential gains — so investors try to stay fully invested unless they have a specific reason to hold reserves. Today our $477 cash is just below the buy threshold, illustrating how small cash balances can sit idle without being large enough to deploy effectively.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」是指投資組合因持有未投資的現金而承受的績效損失。持有現金雖然降低了風險，但也意味著可能錯過市場潛在收益——因此投資者通常盡量保持滿倉，除非有特定原因需要保留備用金。今日我們的477美元現金略低於買入門檻，正好說明小額現金餘額有時難以有效部署，只能閒置於帳戶中。
